title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMBuilding
description: A building or group of connected buildings from OpenStreetMap tagged with building=*. Represents the physical structure of a building, including its geometry, dimensions, materials, and functional classification. For specific functions within a building (shop, amenity, etc.) additional entities should be used.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMBuilding

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

buildingType.description: Property. The OSM building tag value classifying the type or function of the building. Enum:'yes, residential, apartments, house, detached, bungalow, cabin, dormitory, hotel, commercial, office, industrial, warehouse, retail, supermarket, school, university, hospital, church, cathedral, mosque, synagogue, civic, government, public, transportation, train_station, stadium, garage, shed, greenhouse, service, ruins'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building'

buildingLevels.description: Property. Number of above-ground floors in the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:levels'

buildingLevelsUnderground.description: Property. Number of underground or basement floors in the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:levels:underground'

buildingHeight.description: Property. Total height of the building in metres from ground to highest point. Units:'m'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:height'

minHeight.description: Property. Height of the base of the building above ground level in metres, used for buildings on slopes or elevated structures. Units:'m'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:min_height'

roofShape.description: Property. Shape of the roof. Enum:'flat, gabled, hipped, half-hipped, pyramidal, gambrel, mansard, dome, skillion, round, saltbox, onion, cone'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:roof:shape'

roofMaterial.description: Property. Primary material of the roof surface. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:roof:material'

roofColour.description: Property. Colour of the roof, expressed as a CSS colour name or hex code. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:roof:colour'

buildingMaterial.description: Property. Primary structural or facade material of the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:material'

buildingColour.description: Property. Colour of the main facade, expressed as a CSS colour name or hex code. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:colour'

startDate.description: Property. Year or date when the building was constructed. Free-form date or year value. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:start_date'

amenity.description: Property. Primary amenity function of the building (e.g. hospital, school). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:amenity'

operator.description: Property. Name of the entity operating or managing the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator'

wheelchair.description: Property. Level of wheelchair accessibility of the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wheelchair'

access.description: Property. General access restriction to the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:access'

flats.description: Property. Total number of individual dwelling units within the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:flats'

address.description: Property. Address of the building, structured following schema.org PostalAddress.

houseNumber.description: Property. House or building number. OSM: addr:housenumber

addressCountry.description: Property. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. OSM: addr:country

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours of the building or its primary function in OSM opening_hours syntax. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:opening_hours'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
